title: Gomphandra donnaiensis
taxonomy: Gomphandra donnaiensis belongs to the family Stemonuraceae. This plant is classified in the genus Gomphandra. It is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as China, Laos, and Thailand. Gomphandra donnaiensis is an evergreen tree species within the family Stemonuraceae. The classification of Gomphandra donnaiensis is further divided into various ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.
uses: Gomphandra donnaiensis is a plant with reported medicinal uses, particularly in traditional medicine. Its leaves are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
